OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

MICROSOFT_DEFENDER_INCIDENTS_TENANT_ID.description: Azure Tenant ID for Microsoft Graph API authentication.

MICROSOFT_DEFENDER_INCIDENTS_CLIENT_ID.description: Azure App Client ID for Microsoft Graph API authentication.

MICROSOFT_DEFENDER_INCIDENTS_CLIENT_SECR.description: Azure App Client Secret for Microsoft Graph API authentication.

MICROSOFT_DEFENDER_INCIDENTS_IMPORT_STAR.description: Start date for importing incidents in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'). Used only on the first run; subsequent runs use the stored state.

MICROSOFT_DEFENDER_INCIDENTS_INCIDENT_PA.description: Microsoft Graph API path for retrieving security incidents.
